title.zh: 一种面向 RISC-V 处理器的高效前端设计方案
title.en: An Efficient Front-End Design Scheme for RISC-V Processors

description.zh: 提出了一种改进的指令预取与分支预测协同优化方法，通过解耦取指与译码阶段的关键路径，显著减少了流水线停顿周期。在 FPGA 原型验证中取得了 18% 的 IPC 提升。
description.en: Proposed an improved instruction prefetch and branch prediction co-optimization method that significantly reduces pipeline stall cycles by decoupling critical paths in the fetch and decode stages. Achieved 18% IPC improvement in FPGA prototype verification.

title.zh: 基于 Systolic Array 的 Transformer 推理加速器设计
title.en: A Systolic Array-Based Inference Accelerator for Transformer Models

description.zh: 设计了面向 Transformer 自注意力机制的脉动阵列加速器，通过权值静态数据流与双缓冲策略，在 Xilinx FPGA 上实现了 2.3× 的能效比提升。
description.en: Designed a systolic array accelerator targeting Transformer self-attention mechanisms, achieving 2.3× energy efficiency improvement on Xilinx FPGA through weight-stationary dataflow and double-buffering strategies.

title.zh: 开源 EDA 工具链在先进工艺节点下的验证方法研究
title.en: Validation Methodology for Open-Source EDA Toolchains at Advanced Technology Nodes

journal.zh: 电子设计自动化大会 (DAC) 海报, 2025

description.zh: 系统评估了 OpenROAD、Yosys 等开源 EDA 工具在 28nm 工艺节点下的综合与布局布线质量，与商业工具进行了全面对比分析。
description.en: Systematically evaluated synthesis and place-and-route quality of open-source EDA tools including OpenROAD and Yosys at 28nm technology node, with comprehensive comparison against commercial tools.
